heading: Reports by carriers, lessors, and associations
label: 15723 Reports by carriers, lessors, and associations
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11145 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11145 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.heading: .—Filing of Reports
children.label: a .—Filing of Reports
children.text: The Board may require pipeline carriers, lessors, and associations, or classes of them as the Board may prescribe, to file annual, periodic, and special reports with the Board containing answers to questions asked by it.

children.heading: .—Under Oath
children.label: b .—Under Oath
children.text: Any report under this section shall be made under oath.
